description_for_human: 輸入台灣地址，免費查詢淹水與地震風險。資料來源為政府公開平台。
description_for_model: Assess flood (24h 350/500/650mm rainfall scenarios) and earthquake (active fault + soil liquefaction) risk for any Taiwanese residential address. Accepts a traditional-Chinese address string, returns a 0-100 score per hazard with level, color, scenario breakdown, and geocoded location. Sources: Taiwan gov open data. Not for legal, real-estate, insurance or lending decisions.
